title: cytisus austriacus subsp. heuffelii
intro: Cytisus austriacus subsp. heuffelii, also known as Austrian bitter pea or Heuffel's bitter pea, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Cytisus austriacus subsp. heuffelii is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in supplements and medicinal products.
